description_long: This object is a small rectangular parcel, likely a package or delivery box, with a brown exterior resembling cardboard and a lighter-colored label or sticker on one face. The box is compact and appears to be sealed, with no visible openings or handles. The surface is matte and slightly textured, typical of corrugated cardboard used for shipping. The label area is a pale gray or white, suggesting a space for shipping information or barcodes. The object is solid and lightweight, designed for easy handling and transport. Its size and proportions indicate it is suitable for small to medium-sized deliveries in urban environments.
description: A small, brown rectangular parcel with a pale label, resembling a sealed cardboard delivery box.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown face with a pale rectangular label centered on it.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain brown side of the parcel, with the label not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid brown back of the parcel, no label present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the brown side without the label.
